name: Medianyky (Honey Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1 large egg, beaten with a little
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, spices, powdered sugar, and baking powder.
2. Add the eggs, honey, and orange peel to make a soft dough.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured work surface to about 1/2-inch thick.
4. Cut into shapes with cookie cutters and place on a lightly greased or non-stick cookie sheet.
5. Brush each cookie with egg wash glaze.
6. Place half an almond in the top center of each cookie and sprinkle with sugar crystals.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until done, about 15 minutes.
8. Cool on wire racks and store in airtight tins.
